issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on happy path.

scenarios.name: SVG-as-component loader migration
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes a webpack() function in next.config.js that Turbopack ignores; treatment uses the documented experimental.turbo.rules shape with as: "*.js" and resolveAlias canvas:false.

scenarios.name: HMR scaling at 30k modules
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives vague speed claims and may use the obsolete --turbo flag; treatment cites the documented ~12-14ms constant HMR, lazy compilation of visited routes, persistent caching, and the explicit next dev --turbopack flag.
